project_context.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Functional Tech
project_context.description: Mobile web app for delivery drivers to upload PDF remissions, capture delivery data (vehicle, driver, time, receiver), and sign via touch canvas. No login required.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Mobile-first, single column. High tactile density.
layout_and_spacing.touch_targets: Minimum 56px height (h-14) for all interactive elements to accommodate driver usage on-the-go.
layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#FDFBF7] flex flex-col shadow-2xl shadow-black/5
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-4, p-6, and gap-6 generously to avoid misclicks.
layout_and_spacing.borders: rounded-xl for cards, inputs, and buttons. 2px borders on active/focus states for high visibility.

components.buttons: Large, block-level buttons. Primary uses #1E8E3E. Secondary uses #E8B89B. Avoid ghost buttons for critical actions.
components.inputs: h-14, rounded-xl, bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0]. Focus state must have ring-2 ring-[#1E8E3E]. Text must be 16px to prevent iOS auto-zoom.
components.signature_canvas: Must be inline or in a full-height view. NEVER in a popup/dialog (per user request). Ensure touch-action: none to prevent page scrolling while signing. Provide a clear 'Clear/Erase' button.
components.navigation: Bottom tab bar or sticky top header. No hamburger menus. Keep it flat.
components.cards: Surface white, rounded-xl, subtle shadow-sm, border border-black/5.

motion.interactions: Fast, functional micro-interactions. Use active:scale-[0.98] for button press feedback.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='submit-delivery-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over #E8B89B has minimum 4.5:1 contrast.

history_empty_state.description: Clean cardboard box for empty delivery history state

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a strictly mobile-first view (max-w-md mx-auto is acceptable for desktop rendering).

Do NOT use any modal dialogs (Dialog, Alert, Modal) that obstruct the screen. The user explicitly requested 'que no sean obstruidos por cuadros de dialogo'. Use inline components or full-page routing.

The core flow involves: 1. Uploading a PDF. 2. Filling delivery data (Vehicle plate, Driver name, Date/Time, Receiver name). 3. Signing via a touch-friendly canvas. 4. Generating/Processing the signed PDF for download.
For the signature canvas, ensure the canvas block does not trigger native browser scroll when drawing (touch-action: none).
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all inputs, buttons, and significant UI wrappers.
Apply Ovosanti corporate colors precisely as defined.
